# Production Draco Smoke Fixtures

Small public `.drc` fixtures that mirror glTF-oriented Draco v2.2 Edgebreaker
layouts seen in production assets. They are intentionally compact. Passing
fixtures are used by Rust-vs-C++ decode fingerprint tests; the multi-color
fixture is a committed reproducer for the current multiple `COLOR` attribute
parity gap.

## Files

- `cube_att.mesh_eb.v2.2.pos_norm_uv.drc`
  - Source: `testdata/cube_att.obj`
  - Encoder: `draco-version-tools/main-77e616e/draco_encoder.exe`
  - Command: `draco_encoder.exe -i testdata/cube_att.obj -o testdata/production_draco/cube_att.mesh_eb.v2.2.pos_norm_uv.drc -cl 10 -qp 11 -qt 10 -qn 8`
  - Header: `v2.2 geometry=mesh method=edgebreaker traversal=0 encoded_vertices=8 faces=12 attribute_data=2 split_symbols=0`
  - Coverage: position, normal, texcoord attribute seams.

- `test_pos_color.mesh_eb.v2.2.pos_color.drc`
  - Source: `testdata/test_pos_color.ply`
  - Encoder: `draco-version-tools/main-77e616e/draco_encoder.exe`
  - Command: `draco_encoder.exe -i testdata/test_pos_color.ply -o testdata/production_draco/test_pos_color.mesh_eb.v2.2.pos_color.drc -cl 10 -qp 11 -qg 8`
  - Header: `v2.2 geometry=mesh method=edgebreaker traversal=0 encoded_vertices=114 faces=224 attribute_data=1 split_symbols=17`
  - Coverage: position and color with Edgebreaker split symbols.

- `blender_multi_color.mesh_eb.v2.2.pos_norm_uv_color012.drc`
  - Source: temporary synthetic Blender mesh exported as GLB, then the
    `KHR_draco_mesh_compression` bufferView was extracted as raw DRC.
  - Tool: Blender `4.3.2`, glTF exporter with Draco compression enabled.
  - Export settings: compression level `10`, position quantization `14`,
    normal quantization `10`, texcoord quantization `12`, color quantization
    `10`, generic quantization `12`.
  - Header: `v2.2 geometry=mesh method=edgebreaker traversal=0 encoded_vertices=36 faces=12 attribute_data=5 split_symbols=0`
  - Coverage: glTF-style position, normal, texcoord, and multiple color
    attributes (`COLOR_0`, `COLOR_1`, `COLOR_2`).
  - Status: Rust decode succeeds, but strict C++ fingerprint parity is still
    tracked by the ignored
    `cpp_and_rust_decode_fingerprints_match_for_multi_color_fixture` test.

- `bpy_point_cloud.seq.v2.3.pos_norm_color.drc`
  - Source: temporary synthetic point cloud generated by Blender `bpy` and
    written as ASCII PLY with positions, normals, and RGBA colors.
  - Encoder: `draco-version-tools/main-77e616e/draco_encoder.exe`
  - Command: `draco_encoder.exe -point_cloud -i <temp-ply> -o testdata/production_draco/bpy_point_cloud.seq.v2.3.pos_norm_color.drc -cl 0 -qp 14 -qn 10 -qg 10`
  - Header: `v2.3 geometry=point_cloud method=sequential`
  - Coverage: sequential point-cloud decode with position, normal, and color
    attributes.

- `bpy_point_cloud.kd.v2.3.pos_norm_color.drc`
  - Source: same temporary synthetic Blender `bpy` point cloud as the sequential
    fixture.
  - Encoder: `draco-version-tools/main-77e616e/draco_encoder.exe`
  - Command: `draco_encoder.exe -point_cloud -i <temp-ply> -o testdata/production_draco/bpy_point_cloud.kd.v2.3.pos_norm_color.drc -cl 10 -qp 14 -qn 10 -qg 10`
  - Header: `v2.3 geometry=point_cloud method=kd-tree`
  - Coverage: KD-tree point-cloud decode with position, normal, and color
    attributes.
